name: Palo Alto Cortex XDR — EDR/XDR alerts
description: Imports Palo Alto Cortex XDR alerts (XDR API get_alerts export — alerts under reply.alerts.data) into XORCISM as security alerts (XINCIDENT.ALERT), with the impacted endpoint linked as an ASSET and the MITRE tactic/technique kept as the classification. Severity is normalized from low/medium/high/critical. Idempotent by source+alert id. Offline: pass `file` = a Cortex XDR alerts JSON, or run with the bundled sample.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A Cortex XDR alerts JSON export (get_alerts) to parse
